case_title: KONG & COMPANY vs. BROWN, STEVEN et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STEVEN DEAKIN, MATHEW

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, STEVEN DEAKIN, MATHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2414 CLEMENT ST.UPPER BACK UNIT, RIGHT HAND SIDE, DOWN ALLEY, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF FRANK KONG FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG & COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG & COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, STEVEN DEAKIN, MATHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON OCT. 7, 1996 $2,101.79 RENT, $164.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,265.79, LEASE FORFEITED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS PER JUDGE QUIDACHAY, DEPT 2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG & COMPANY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG & COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STEVEN DEAKIN, MATHEW DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG & COMPANY SERVED SEP-26-1996, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STEVEN DEAKIN, MATHEW
